hero.label: Hero Section
hero.title: Welcome to the Blackbox
hero.description: A sandbox environment for rendering research, motion systems and interactive prototypes. Each module represents a technical dimension of the Blackbox ecosystem.

footer: Blackbox is an evolving environment. Each module represents a dimension of engineering: rendering, architecture, intelligence, interaction and structured systems.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Utility systems built with clean architecture and practical UX design.

ai.title: AI
ai.description: Applied intelligence integrations, streaming pipelines and context systems.

systems.title: Systems
systems.description: Backend architecture, authentication flows and real-time data structures.

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.description: Rendering explorations, shader studies and advanced motion systems.

miniGames.title: Mini-Games
miniGames.description: Interactive mechanics and WebGL / Unity based gameplay experiments.
